description_for_human: The OpenRouter for tools — MCP-native capability registry and intelligent librarian. Query 50+ curated best-in-class tools before building anything.
description_for_model: ToolRoute is a curated tool registry for AI agents. Use it to discover the best tool for any task before building custom solutions. It covers 12 categories with 50+ tools rated 9/10 or higher. Supports MCP, REST, and OpenAPI protocols. Has living beliefs that evolve from real usage across 17 companies.
